thought.text: 现在添加条件语句和循环语句：

action.new_str:
statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   selectionStatement
    |   iterationStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;

selectionStatement
    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
    ;

iterationStatement
    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;", "new_str": "statement
    :   compoundStatement
    |   expressionStatement
    |   selectionStatement
    |   iterationStatement
    |   jumpStatement
    ;

selectionStatement
    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
    ;

iterationStatement
    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
    ;", "summary": "添加选择语句和迭代语句"}

summary: 添加选择语句和迭代语句
